Package org.eventb.internal.core.typecheck

Class SealedTypeEnvironment

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.typecheck.TypeEnvironment
org.eventb.internal.core.typecheck.SealedTypeEnvironment
All Implemented Interfaces:
ISealedTypeEnvironment, ITypeEnvironment
public final class SealedTypeEnvironment extends TypeEnvironment implements ISealedTypeEnvironment
Here we reuse the implementation of type environment, only creating a separate type to guarantee immutability.

  • Method Details

    • makeSnapshot

      public ISealedTypeEnvironment makeSnapshot()
      Description copied from interface: ITypeEnvironment
      Get an immutable snapshot of this type environment.
      Specified by:
      makeSnapshot in interface ITypeEnvironment
      Returns:
      a snapshot of this type environment

    • translate

      public ISealedTypeEnvironment translate(FormulaFactory factory)
      Description copied from interface: ITypeEnvironment
      Returns a copy of this type environment built with the given formula factory.

      If the factory of this type environment and the given factory are the same, then this type environment is returned, rather than an identical copy of it. Otherwise a new type environment object is built.

      Calling this method when ITypeEnvironment.isTranslatable(FormulaFactory) returns false will raise an IllegalArgumentException.

      Specified by:
      translate in interface ISealedTypeEnvironment
      Specified by:
      translate in interface ITypeEnvironment
      Parameters:
      factory - the target formula factory
      Returns:
      an equivalent type environment built with the given factory
